title: crepidium kinabaluense
intro: Crepidium kinabaluense, also known as the Kinabalu crepidium, is a species of orchid native to Borneo. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and can be used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Crepidium kinabaluense is often used in the form of a tincture or decoction, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
